calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
MINI MINUTES: HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (of Claimant Chao Lu). No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: defendant's claim of exemption is granted in part and denied in part. The Sheriff is ordered to release $510.00 to the Judgment Creditor but not to garnish further wages. Defendant is directed to pay Plaintiff $50.00 per month until judgment is paid off. Order signed. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
